handles: creating → delegate ULID minting to HasPrefixedUlid trait (prefix `gfc_`)
creating → default metadata={} when null (jsonb column has default but PHP-side we ensure it never lands as null)
creating → refuse when subject_type is not a snake_case identifier (defensive; PolygonValidator+form request also enforce)
creating → refuse when supersedes_check_id references a row in a different workspace (cross-workspace defence)
created → fire GeofenceCheckCreated (domain event; distinct from GeofenceEvaluated which is fired by the SERVICE)
updating → refuse via RuntimeException from the model's saving hook (immutability guard). Observer never receives an update event.
deleting → accept only when the actor is a platform_admin (retention path) OR the caller is the SoftDeletes internal flow
observers.immutability_note: The immutability guard is on the MODEL's booted() `saving` hook — not this observer. The observer's `updating` never fires because the exception aborts before it.
